creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177166
py-seafobj.diff

This is an update to py-seafobj to the most current version, 6.0.3. This version has no commits between the two, but I want to keep seafdav and seafobj the same version for sanity.

* Updated to 6.0.3
* Added license file
* Fixed pkg-desc www --> WWW

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
